title: U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA)
text:
Third-quarter 2025
U.S. production of uranium concentrate (U3O8) in the third quarter of 2025 totaled 329,623 pounds U3O8, an 44% decrease from second quarter production of 477,501 pounds U3O8. This quarter’s total uranium production occurred at six facilities, five in Wyoming (Nichols Ranch ISR Project, Ross CPP, Lost Creek Project, Smith Ranch-Highland Operation, and Willow Creek Project) and one in Texas (Alta Mesa).
